differentials.name: simple / complicated parapneumonic effusion
differentials.raw: simple / complicated parapneumonic effusion (negative Gram + culture stain)

context: increased thickness + density of paraspinal subcostal tissue (= inflammation of extrapleural | curvilinear enhancement of chest wall boundary in 96% (= inflammatory hyperemia of | "split pleura" sign = pleural fluid between enhancing thickened parietal + visceral pleura | gas bubbles in pleural space (gas-forming organism / bronchopleural fistula)
